response.text: pong — OO online.
OO received: _help_ (no handler wired — Phase 1 will route this).
pong — sales_reps online.

sales_reps — specialist agent. Available:
• `ping` — health check
• `grade <meeting_id>` — grade a single call
• `batch-grade <from> <to>` — grade calls over a date range (YYYY-MM-DD)
• `brief <opp_id|account_name>` — pre-demo brief
• `hygiene [ae_email]` — pipeline hygiene report
• `leaderboard [ae|sdr] [week]` — weekly rankings
• `scorecard <rep_email>` — per-rep scorecard
• `sync-check` — Momentum↔SF sync diff
• `risk-sweep` — deal-risk signal sweep (pushed close, amount drop, competitor)
Alias: `@oo closer …` routes here too.
pong — RevOps Support online.

RevOps Support commands:
• `@oo revops-support ping` — health check
• `@oo revops-support soql <query>` — run read-only SOQL
• `@oo revops-support pipeline by stage` — open opps grouped by stage
• `@oo revops-support stale opportunities [days]` — opps stale > N days (default 30)
• `@oo revops-support tlos with no opps` — TLOs with zero opportunities
• `@oo revops-support opps missing products` — Closed Won without line items
• `@oo revops-support accounts with no tlo` — accounts missing TLO linkage
• `@oo revops-support duplicate contacts` — emails with >1 contact
• `@oo revops-support active users` — users with login in last 30 days
• `@oo revops-support validation rules <ObjectName>` — active rules for object
• `@oo revops-support validation monitor` — org-wide validation-rule health check
• `@oo revops-support bad conversions` — orphaned Lead-conversions (no opp/account/contact)
• `@oo revops-support dedup contacts` — cluster duplicate Contacts by email + propose merges
• `@oo revops-support dedup accounts` — fuzzy-cluster duplicate Accounts + propose merges
• `@oo revops-support help` — this message
Alias: `@oo admin …` routes here too.
pong — slt_metrics online.

slt_metrics — SLT revenue intelligence. Available:
• `ping` — health check
• `forecast <quarter>` — commit / best-case / weighted rollup
• `movers [period]` — top deal movers over a window
• `scorecard ae|sdr|team <target>` — per-rep or team scorecard
• `briefing` — daily 8:30 AM narrative (DM draft to O)
• `friday` — Friday 4 PM weekly review (DM draft to O)
• `weights show|set|propose` — inspect / adjust forecast weights
• `backtest <from> <to>` — replay scorer over a date range
Alias: `@oo urkel …` routes here too.
pong — top_of_funnel online.

top_of_funnel — Phase 1 specialist agent. Available:
• `ping` — health check
• `enrich <domain>` — run the full pipeline on one account
• `score <domain>` — ICP score only, no writes
• `daily [dry-run]` — trigger or preview the 07:55 SDR briefing
• `suppress <email> [reason]` — add to local suppression cache
• `queue status` — pending outbound-sequence approval gates
• `queue approve <gate_id>` — approve today's enrollment queue
• `credits` — Clay credit usage this month
Alias: `@oo outbounder …` routes here too.
pong — CS online.

CS agent commands:
• `@oo cs ping` — health check
• `@oo cs status <account>` — account summary
• `@oo cs health <account>` — Vitally health + trend
• `@oo cs renewals` — T-120 window + stalls
• `@oo cs churn-risk [50|70|85]` — scored accounts
• `@oo cs brief <account>` — pre-renewal brief
• `@oo cs qbr <account>` — QBR markdown
Alias: `@oo supporter …` routes here too.
pong — onboarding online.

Onboarding agent commands:
• `@oo onboarding ping` — health check
• `@oo onboarding status <account>` — Onboarding__c snapshot
• `@oo onboarding stalls [days]` — stalled onboardings (default ≥5 business days)
• `@oo onboarding unassigned` — onboardings with null OwnerId
• `@oo onboarding stuck-locations [account]` — stuck locations
• `@oo onboarding handoff <account>` — run handoff checklist on demand
• `@oo onboarding skip <opp_id> <justification>` — override a blocking handoff item
• `@oo onboarding assign <gate_id> <user_id>` — complete an approved CSM reassignment
• `@oo onboarding backfill --preview` — count historical Closed Won gaps
Alias: `@oo onboarder …` routes here too.
